items.speaker: Doudou
items.text: What happens next, Encore?

items.speaker: Mingming
items.text: Yeah, we wanna hear the rest of the story!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Oh, settle down you two. The Wooly Warrior will come out once everyone's nicely in their seats.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Plus, Encore's still waiting for a friend. Ah, there {Male=he;Female=she} is!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Rover!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Encore finally got to see you again!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Encore was wondering if you'd come, and even had Cosmos and Cloudy go scouting for you.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Encore wants you to come play with us and listen to our stories!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Everyone was so busy the last time Encore's here in Jinzhou, we didn't even get to play together.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But Encore won't let that happen again, cuz Encore's here on vacation this time!

options.text: Didn't know they gave vacations at Black Shores.
Vacation? Is your homework done yet?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Of course, they do. Everyone at Black Shores is really nice. Even someone as busy as Aalto gets to have them.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: What? Encore doesn't know anything about any homework.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Anyway, since we finally got some free time, I told Aalto I wanted to visit some friends in Jinzhou.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But he just lay in his chair, bragged about how he has so much grown-up stuff to worry about and was too busy for playtime.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Oh, poor grown-ups, they're always so busy. They don't even have time for stories.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Well, too bad for Aalto. All I could do was come here by myself with my stories and Aalto's wallet.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Right, let me introduce you to everyone, but I think most of them have heard about you already.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Gather round everyone. Encore presents to you {PlayerName}! Savior of Jinzhou. Hero of heroes!

options.text: I'm not too sure about that last part, Encore.

items.speaker: Doudou
items.text: Oh, really?! So you're the big hero Encore was talking about. She said you took out that giant TD like this, this, and that! So cool!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Oh, stop trying to hide it already!

items.speaker: Doudou
items.text: Yeah! Encore told us how you took out that giant TD like this, this, and that! So cool!

items.speaker: Doudou
items.text: Are you here for some stories, big hero?

items.speaker: Mingming
items.text: Yup! Encore's stories are really fun, last time we had one about a big bad wolf that can turn itself into mist.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: (Sounds a lot like Aalto...)

items.speaker: Doudou
items.text: Oh, oh. There's this other story about a golden-eyed kitty and its little birdie friend with gray feathers.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: (This one's about me and Yangyang...)

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Uh-huh! There's plenty more of them! This time Encore's got a whole new story to tell!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: It's about the adventures of the Wooly Warrior. You'll love it.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: That's right! Adventures are the best!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Wait till you hear the actual story. I don't wanna spoil anything just yet!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: So, wanna hear Encore's stories?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: If you enjoy stories, Rover, you might even get to go inside one. Whaddya say, Woolies?

items.speaker: Cosmos & Cloudy
items.text: Baa!

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: (Go inside a story... Is Encore using some kind of metaphor? Doesn't hurt to check it out I guess.)

options.text: I've got other things to do.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Great! Come, Encore's even saved a front-row seat just for you!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: All right. Settle down everyone. The story's about to start!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Well, that's too bad. I guess you have more important things to take care of...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But, if you ever wanna hear some stories, come find Encore. Encore's saved a front-row seat just for you!

dialog.stepLabel: Encore: "All right. Settle down everyone. The story's about to start!..."

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: All right. Settle down everyone. The story's about to start!

items.speaker: Serious Child
items.text: Is it about the gray birdie? We didn't get to finish it last time.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Nope, today's story will be about the Wooly Warrior and how she makes her wishes come true.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: The story begins in a land of boundless imagination known as the Wooly Kingdom...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Legend says, that deep within the kingdom's castle lies a magical gateway. Whoever passes through it can have any wish come true!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: To reach this gateway, you must first go over a great many obstacles.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Yet, countless adventurers still choose to embark on this journey, for each holds wishes to fulfill.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Before setting off on their quests, Fairy Cloudy will ask them:

items.speaker: Cloudy (Encore)
items.text: "Should you pass through this mythical gateway, you will be granted endless wealth and honor, along with a treasure trove of unforgettable memories."

items.speaker: Cloudy (Encore)
items.text: "Now answer me this... What drives you to venture on this risky journey?"

items.speaker: Serious Child
items.text: If you'd ask me... I'd choose wealth, that way I can buy all the Star Flakes I can eat!

items.speaker: Skeptical Child
items.text: Pfft. I'd definitely choose honor, that way I'll be famous, and everyone would shout my name whenever they see me, wherever!

items.speaker: Cloudy (Encore)
items.text: "What about you, brave adventurer? Do you seek riches or fame? Baa."

items.speaker: Cloudy (Encore)
items.text: Thus you shall accompany the merchants and travel across the high seas to Rinascita.

items.speaker: Cloudy (Encore)
items.text: They say treasures fill its lands, and you'll gain a fortune beyond your wildest dreams!

items.speaker: Cloudy (Encore)
items.text: It appears you're already quite renowned! Baa. Just traverse countless lands along the boundless horizon, and all shall know your name!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Ooh, so this is the kind of choice a grown-up would make!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: That's something the Wooly Warrior would say! Maybe the two of you can team up and adventure together!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: See? Everyone's wishes are different, which also make their journeys unique!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: And among these people, there's a small adventurer that goes by the name of "Wooly Warrior." When asked about her desires, she replies:

items.speaker: Cosmos (Encore)
items.text: "I do not seek wealth or honor. Baa."

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Fairy Cloudy, greatly puzzled by this reply, goes on to ask:

items.speaker: Cloudy (Encore)
items.text: "If you desire neither wealth nor honor, why do you choose to venture to the Gateway of Wishes?"

items.speaker: Cosmos (Encore)
items.text: "I have but one wish, to be reunited with my family."

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Fairy Cloudy nods in approval and offers her guidance to the little warrior.

items.speaker: Cloudy (Encore)
items.text: Very well... then believe in my tale, and close your eyes, Little Warrior and her companions.

items.speaker: Cloudy (Encore)
items.text: When you open your eyes, a brand-new adventure shall unfold before you.

items.speaker: Cloudy (Encore)
items.text: Once we've completed this story together, your wishes will all be granted!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: So, does the Wooly Warrior's companion accept this invitation?

dialog.stepLabel: Encore: "{PlayerName}, welcome back from the Wooly Kingdom!..."

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: {PlayerName}, welcome back from the Wooly Kingdom!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Yuppers! It's where all the Wooly stories begin. Cosmos and Cloudy's home!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: With their help, Encore can even invite friends for a visit!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But not everyone though. The Wooly Kingdom won't welcome anyone who thinks the stories are just made up.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: You're different. You're one of Encore's best friends and have listened to my stories. So Encore wanted to give you a surprise!

options.text: The fights were a bit too realistic for me...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: I know, right? You and I work great as a team!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Really? But you have to admit, the part where Wooly Warrior kicked monster butts was suuuper cool, right?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Encore really enjoys this story. In it, Wooly Warrior and her companions worked their way out of all kinds of trouble. Just like we did.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Mom said that as long as you believe, the stories will give you strength. So whenever I think of them, it makes my heart feel warm.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: And Encore wants to share this warm feeling with you and make you happy too!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Because Encore loves to play and adventure with you! It's just that everyone was so busy last time...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But, this time Encore's here on vacation! Curious about what happens next in the story, Rover?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: If you are, you should join Encore's adventure team, that way we can go and find out its ending together!

options.text: Can I be the team captain?
Is this turning into a make-believe game...?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Umm... Sure, you can be captain and Encore will be the vice-captain!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Ohh, it's not make-believe, this is a serious adventure game! I've been playing it ever since I was little, it'll be a blast! This time, you can be the team captain and I can be the vice-captain!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Now, for our first team assignment, let's go find out everyone's thoughts on the story!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: The joys of the story should be shared with everyone. It's not just my story.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Once we know what the audience thinks, we'll know how to work on the story going forward!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: After all, it's the applause that makes for a curtain call!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Okay! Let's see...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Look! That girl by herself over there, Encore wonders what she thinks about the story... Come on. Let's go ask her!

dialog.stepLabel: Rover: "According to the treasure map, the sword should be around he..."

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: According to the treasure map, the sword should be around here somewhere.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Why are there so many Tick Tacks? Are they having a party?

items.speaker: Tick Tack
items.text: Tick-tack... Tick-tick-tack-tack!

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: They look really angry...

options.text: They're not much of a threat.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: No need to be afraid, Ying! We'll keep you safe!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: You probably don't know this, but Wooly Warrior once met a huge cat monster a hundred times stronger than her, and she was so scared that her legs were trembling!

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: R-really?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: That's right, but even so, she stood her ground.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Because she had all of her friends behind her, she had to fight.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Just like the situation we're in now. Ya can't let a few small TDs beat you down.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Let's make this quick, Encore.

dialog.stepLabel: Ying: "So... Is this the sword in the story that can slice through ..."

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: So... Is this the sword in the story that can slice through anything?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: It's the mountain-chopping Sword of Courage!

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Hmm... The sword's actually made out of wood, and it's missing a small piece too.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Yeah, it looks like it's made out of wood. I don't think it's gonna cut anything really...

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Look, there's a letter.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Quick. What does it say?

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Hmm...

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: "My dear little warrior, you've found the first relic!"

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: "Right now you must be thinking, 'What a plain-looking sword.'"

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: "How could this ordinary wooden sword possibly be the legendary Sword of Courage?"

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: "Don't feel disappointed just yet, think back on what you've been through so far."

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: "All the challenges you've faced along the way. The waves under your feet felt so high to you, and the treasure chest above seemed ever so far away."

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: "Yet still you continued to climb the mountains, every step of the way, until you finally reached the peak. Your courage has been heard."

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: "And this seemingly ordinary wooden sword..."

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Is the proof of your courage.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Yeah, that's what it says in the letter. How did you know, Encore?

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Did it also appear in other Wooly stories?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Uh uh...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Anything else? Did the letter mention any clues about the next relic? We still have two to go!

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Ah. Y-yes!

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: It goes on to say, "Oh, little warrior, your adventure doesn't end here."

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: "To have your wishes come true, courage alone is not enough."

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: "You need not look far, as the shield that symbolizes faith is buried right beneath your very feet."

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: "In a land covered in sand, treasures may lay, or there may be nothing at all."

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: A land covered in sand...

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: I know just the place.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Then let's go check it out! Sounds like it'll be a treasure hunt in the sand!

dialog.stepLabel: Encore: "We're here! At long last, the brave adventurers reach their ..."

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: We're here! At long last, the brave adventurers reach their second destination, and thus they start a hunt for the legendary Shield of Faith on this sand-covered beach.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: They say only the bravest adventurers can find it as it puts their will to the test.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Yeah! That's the spirit!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Oh, you don't wanna jinx it.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Ying can go left, Encore will go right, and you can take care of the middle!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: If anyone finds anything interesting, show me and we can take a look at it together!

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: O-Okay.

dialog.stepLabel: Rover: "This should be the shield mentioned in the story...."

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: This should be the shield mentioned in the story.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: It's also made of wood...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But look at how well-made it is! With the Sword of Courage in one hand, and the Shield of Faith in the other, it's an invincible combo!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: The person who crafted this shield really knew their stuff!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Time for clues about the next relic. The Wreath of Hope.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Hurry, Ying! What does it say?

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: O-Okay. Let's see here. It says...

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: "Congratulations again to you, my little warrior."

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: "Although the bulk of your efforts were in vain, you did not give up and continued searching. Hence, this Shield of Faith is your well-deserved reward."

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: "If you ever feel lost in the future, why not take a moment and ponder on the meaning of your journey?"

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: "The firm belief in our hearts shall guide us through darkness until we reach the light of hope."

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: "Now, I'm sure you're wondering how can you find the Wreath of Hope."

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: "Bring with you your wishes and proceed to the Garden of Promise."

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: The garden?

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: The Garden of Promise—

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Oh! I think... I might know where it is.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Fantastic! Then that's our next stop! Onwards!

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: This is it.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: This place... feels empty. There's nothing here.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: It is now...

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: B-But it used to be filled with irises.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: This is my mom's garden. She used to love flowers and would plant a lot of them when she wasn't busy.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Before she left, she asked me to help look after it, and said she'd come see it with me when she's back.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I watered them every day, hoping they could bloom longer.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: But these flowers only bloom for a short time. They all withered in the end...

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Dad told me, "Don't be sad, sweetie. It's the natural cycle of life."

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I understood that. But it always reminds me of my promise to Mom.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I miss her so much...

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Now I see, this shield and sword are all treasures that Mom left me.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: And here, I think she probably wanted to make a wreath with me using those flowers...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Oh, Ying...

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Thank you, Encore and {PlayerName}.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Actually, when I saw Dad looking sad while holding the map, I had the feeling that Mom...

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Might have left this treasure map to play a game with me.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Maybe it is like what the grown-ups say, the Gateway of Wishes doesn't exist.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: And I may never get to see her again, talk to her, and tell her how much I've grown...

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: But Mom must've wanted to give me a surprise, to make me happy...

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I am happy because we managed to find all the treasures she left behind together.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I'll definitely find a nice place to keep this sword and shield safe.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I think we should end our adventure here. Thank you, Encore and {PlayerName}.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Our captain hasn't announced the end of our adventure yet, and you're thinking about leaving already?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Well, okay then. Let's call it a day right here. There's some stuff I need to wrap my head around too...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: I remember you asked me about the ending of the Wooly Warrior, right?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Even though we finished finding the relics, Team Wooly's adventure goes on.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: There are still plenty of stories to tell... Oh, I know!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: How about you come to Encore's story session tomorrow afternoon?

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Tomorrow... You mean right here?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Yes! If you want to find out what happens to Team Wooly, come over and listen to the rest of the story. Be there or be square!

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I... Okay then. I'll see you tomorrow!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Yup. See you tomorrow, Ying.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: {PlayerName}, do you think this is a good ending to the story?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Mm-hmm. After all, Ying got the treasures left by her mother.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: If this was a story, it would end something like this: "In the end, the little warrior managed to collect all of the relics left by her mother, realizing her intentions."

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Yeah! After all, Ying didn't receive the wreath and she didn't get to see her mother.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Even though in the end, the little warrior did manage to collect all of the relics left by her, realizing her mother's intentions.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But Encore still feels like something's missing.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: In this ending, she didn't even make it to the Gateway of Wishes.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Just like in the story of the Wooly Warrior.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: What do you think? Will the Wooly Warrior's wish come true in the end?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: If it comes true, then she should be able to see her family again.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: After such a wonderful and interesting adventure, she must have so much to say to them.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Even if her wish doesn't come true, the Wooly Warrior will still continue on her adventures.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: She's met so many new friends and has tons of stories to share. She'll remember the people and things she met on this journey.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But actually, there is no true ending to Wooly Warrior's story.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Remember the play Ying told us about when she showed us the treasure map?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Ying said she'd already forgotten what most of the play was about.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: All she could remember was that the hero had been searching for a legendary treasure to make their wishes come true.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: I knew straight away that the treasure map wasn't for the Wooly Warrior's sword.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But it was a gift left to her by Ying's mother.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Wanna guess how I found out?

options.text: Because of the Wooly Warrior's story...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Yes. That play was about the Wooly Warrior's story, and I remember each and every part of it.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Because that play...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Was a gift from my Mom.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Now, time for a story from Encore.

dialog.stepLabel: Encore: "Mom told me that once the applause starts at the final show ..."

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Mom told me that once the applause starts at the final show of our tour, she'd take me onto the stage to make a wish.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But she collapsed before the play ended.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: I was so scared. I tried to come up with ways to make her feel better. I even kept a daily to-do list.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: At the time, I thought that if I stayed a good girl like the characters in the stories, Mom would get better and better...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But her illness got worse. She didn't get better, and the Gateway of Wishes never appeared.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Encore didn't know what to do anymore.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Mom just asked me to sit by her bed and tell her stories.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: So I told her about Warrior Cosmos, Fairy Cloudy, and many other things.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: She always smiled each time.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: It was right around that time when Cosmos and Cloudy appeared from the stories.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Mom told me they're a part of life, and these stories will always be with me.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: After she left, Encore had to become the Wooly Warrior, going on adventures on her own.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Whether it was in the orphanage or with the Black Shores, Encore would write down everything she experienced.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: With these stories, Mom will know what kind of adventures Encore had, and all the friends Encore made.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Later on, Encore wanted to continue writing the Wooly Warrior's story. But this time, it's a bit different from before.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Now she has her own friends. Friends that she can adventure together to find the Gateway of Wishes.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Because finding that gateway...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Is the only way she can tell all her stories to her mom so she knows how well she did.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: That's why...

options.text: That's why when you met Ying...
You wanted to go on an adventure with Ying.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Yeah. She said she had a lot to say to her mother.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Just like me. There's so much Encore wants to say and so many stories that Encore wants Mom to hear.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Our time with Ying reminded me of all of that.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Even though Wooly Warrior's story has no true ending...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Will Ying's be any different? Will she be able to make her wish come true?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: In the end, Ying said the adventure is over, and it's just a story...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: She said she was happy and satisfied with that, but Encore saw that look on her face.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: She looked really, really sad.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Encore knows how it feels. Just like how it used to be. No matter what Encore did, Mom wouldn't get any better.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: My stories were the only things that could make her feel happy...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: It was Mom who made me understand the power of stories.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: That's why after I went on this journey alone, Cosmos and Cloudly came out of the land of imagination.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: And it's why Encore told Ying that our adventure should not end like this.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: This story deserves a better ending.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: {PlayerName}...

options.text: We should finish the story. Together.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Agreed! The story must have an ending!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But what should we do?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: There's no way we can bring Ying's mother back. I mean, the Gateway of Wishes doesn't actually exist in real life...

options.text: Then let's go find it in the story.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: In the story?

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: I remember Cloudy said that if you ever find yourself in a pickle in real life, you can always go back to the Wooly Kingdom to search for clues.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: You also mentioned that's where the Gateway of Wishes is hidden, right? And you've always wanted to finish writing the story of the Wooly Warrior.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: This means the final stage of the story should be set inside the Wooly Kingdom.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Encore sees what you mean!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Encore can invite you and Ying into the Wooly Kingdom, and go on a real adventure with me—the Wooly Warrior!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But... the Kingdom isn't someplace you can go willy-nilly.

options.text: We need Ying to believe the Wooly Kingdom really exists.
We need Ying to realize that we're her friends.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Only those who believe in the Kingdom can visit...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: That's for sure! We're a team together!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: We should make a wreath for her and let her know that our adventure's not over yet!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Encore remembers it went something like this, the wreath is "A crown of flowers that can reflect a person's thoughts. Never withers, forever blossoming."

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: How are we gonna make it?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: You mean... Verina!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: That's right! Verina loves flowers, she's a flower's best friend!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Let's see if she has any ideas.

dialog.stepLabel: Verina: "Hi, {PlayerName}. Oh, Encore's here, too. How's it been?..."

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: Hi, {PlayerName}. Oh, Encore's here, too. How's it been?

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: Are you here to see the new blossoms? You'll have to wait a while. They're still a bit shy.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Hi Verina, er, not exactly. we're here to ask you how we can make the Wreath of Hope.

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: The Wreath of Hope...?
You give Verina a run-down of the story.

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: I see. You want to help finish the story Ying's mother left her and make her wish come true.

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: But... I don't know how to make such a wreath either.

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: According to the story, this wreath is made of various kinds of flowers, it can reflect a person's thoughts, and it must blossom forever and never wither.

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: The flowers that can reflect people's thoughts... The ones that I can think of are Waterlamps—These flowers emit a faint glow at night, and passersby use them to guide their way.

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: Or Wintry Bells. Wintry Bells bloom in cold and snowy weather. Seeing them in a cold winter will definitely make you happy.

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: It can also be Dewvetchs. Due to their sweetness, they remind people of sugary candies.

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: However... these flowers all bloom in different seasons, so it'll be hard to put them together, let alone have them blossom forever and never wither.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Yeah, I remember you created a Blake Bloom for Rover that one time!

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: That's a bit different.

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: Flowers made with Forte are just artificial creations. They can easily break up without actual substance.

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: It's not the same as life. Every life has its own journey, from blooming to withering, recording the feelings of every moment along the way.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Feelings...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Oh! I know!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Since we can't really make a wreath of flowers exactly like the one in the story, we can make one using our feelings!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Yes! Exactly!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: When me and Mom made wreaths, she'd always ask me to pick my favorite flowers.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: If I was feeling happy, I would choose a bright red flower, since it made my heart feel warm. If I was feeling unhappy, I would take a blue one.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: At this point, it really doesn't matter what kind of flower it is. All that matters is everyone's feelings!

options.text: Everyone's choice of flowers would be different.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: We should make a wreath, and tell Ying our wishes to make our dreams come true!

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: I see what you mean. A wreath made with feelings...

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: With that, you can express yourself.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: That's right! Let's find flowers that can express our feelings!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: When she sees the wreath, she'll definitely realize that the story of our team is still going!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: This way, we can all visit the Wooly Kingdom together, and maybe our wishes can come true!

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: Do you mind if I help?

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: Once you've collected enough flowers, bring them to me. I'll help you weave them into a wreath.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Great! Thank you, Verina! Off we go!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: {PlayerName}, you're here!

options.text: Told ya I won't be late.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: You're right on time. Encore has just set everything up.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Of course not, you're right on time. Encore has just set everything up.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: See this little stage? Cosmos and Cloudy helped me set it up. Pretty impressive, don'tcha think?

options.text: Are you getting ready for an audition?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Cloudy says, "Right on. That's teamwork for ya!"

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: "Hmph. Give us some extra time, and we can make one bigger than that giant gate of Jinzhou. Baa!" Says Cosmos.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Audition? That actually sounds like a good idea. Then you can be part of Encore's cheerleading squad, {PlayerName}!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: I know this is just a small stage for storytelling. I wanted to try the way Mom used to do it. She and I started the Wooly Warrior story after all.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Besides, it'll be more fun this way!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Encore wonders if Ying will show up today. We didn't really pinky-promise...

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Encore, {PlayerName}. Sorry for the wait...

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Th-Thank you...

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I'm so sorry...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: All right. Now that Team Wooly's fully assembled, is everyone ready for the story?

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Ready. Umm... This stage...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: This is the small stage Encore made for the play, where the warrior's adventure continues.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Does anyone remember where we last left off?

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I know...The Wooly Warrior was trying to find the three relics, but I'm not sure if she will find them or not.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: That's right. The Wooly Warrior sets out to find the three relics. This time she is not alone. She tries to climb to the top of the highest mountain with her trusty companions.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: With the mountain being so high up, the waves raging below them, she nearly falls several times, but her friends manage to keep her steady.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: In the end, she obtains the legendary Sword of Courage.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Later, she arrives at a beach, filled with sand as far as the eye can see. She searches and searches, and all she can find are just some tiny shells.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But with the help from her friends, the Shield of Faith is uncovered. Only the Wreath remains.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: W-will she find it?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Unfortunately, no. After reaching the mythical Sea of Flowers, all the flowers have withered. No matter where she searches, the Wreath of Hope is nowhere to be found.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Just like us...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Yet, her companions want to finish this adventure for her.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: They gather flowers and weave their feelings into the shape of a crown.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: The pink flowers are meant to make her feel happy, the blue flowers are hopes that she will not be scared of any obstacles...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: This wreath brings together all the feelings and emotions of the companions during their adventure. Their gift to her.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: And that... is the moral of the story.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Her companions remark so. The wreath isn't fully completed. It's missing a very important flower.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Ying, this wreath is missing the flower that represents your feelings and wishes.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: My feelings...

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I know. It's missing an iris. I've always wanted Mom to see a garden full of blooming irises.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: But those irises have already withered...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: What if we could find one?

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Find one...?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: What if we can find an iris and the Gateway of Wishes? Will you want to continue on this adventure, Ying?

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I... Of course! But I thought there was no such thing as the Gateway of Wishes. It only exists in the story...

options.text: If there isn't one in reality...
We can find it in the story.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: In the story...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: That's right! Because stories aren't just stories. When you believe in them, they'll really exist.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Just like how it is now. With everyone's feelings combined into the wreath, it slowly turns into a door. A door that leads to the deepest parts of the Wooly Kingdom.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Inside, the irises continue to bloom.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: So, do you believe in it and choose to continue this adventure?

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I believe.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Great. Off we go!

dialog.stepLabel: Encore: "And just like that, the little warrior's wish's come true, p..."

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: And just like that, the little warrior's wish's come true, putting a perfect ending to this adventure story.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: The warrior finally gets to meet her mother, telling her all the stories and words she has always wanted to tell.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But the warrior's journey won't end here, as the path ahead is a long one.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Encore, {PlayerName}. Thank you both so much.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I-I finally got to see her, and we talked so much. I told her how much I've missed her, how I found the treasures she left behind, and how I met both of you...

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I never thought I'd see her again.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: So, I want you to have this.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Yes! I know you still have more adventures ahead, so I'd like this wreath to keep you company.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I want to go back and tell my dad this story now, and tell him what my mother said to me. So, this is where we say goodbye.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Be sure to share our story with everyone!

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I will! Goodbye!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Time for another feedback session from the audience. What do you think of this story?

options.text: It's a story with a very happy ending.
The fights were still a bit too realistic for me.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Hehe, Encore loves this ending!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But the parts where everyone was fighting as a team were super, super cool!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Encore loves this ending!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: The Wooly Warrior finally fulfilled her wish, and she got to tell her mother all her stories.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: About the companions she got to meet.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Who she went on adventures with, defeating all kinds of monsters that stood in their way!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Their search for the sword and shield as a team, and how they put together the Wreath of Hope.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: We've been to many places together, but there's so much more to go, and so many adventures and stories to write about.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: These stories are an extension of life, they are...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Yeah. Stories with happy endings! Mom said the same thing.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Yeah, Encore had never thought of such an ending when telling the Wooly Warrior story in the past.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: I really enjoyed how it ended.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: The story of the Wooly Warrior's search for the relics is finished, and my vacation is about to end. It's time to head back to Black Shores...

options.text: That was a really short vacation.
Don't forget to finish your homework.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Well, we are kinda busy over there most of the year.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Oh, enough with the homework already.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: No biggie. Even though this story is over, Encore will make sure to prepare a new adventure next time we meet!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Let's be on the same team together, and you can still be the captain! Wanna do a pinky promise?

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: You reach out and lock your pinky with Encore's. Gazing into her eyes, you see the Wooly Warrior's earnest expression as she makes a heartfelt wish.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: I pinky promise that we'll write as many stories as we can together...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: As a team...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Pinky promised!

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: You two were incredible...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: You betcha!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Wait till you see what else we can do! Am I right, {PlayerName}?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: We'll take on anything they chuck at us!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Are you sure? Doesn't look like you are. Lemme give you a quick check-up...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Oh! Cut it out already!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Quick, let's check and see if the sword's around here. Is that some kind of puzzle over there? Do we need to put something inside of it to activate it?

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: It's a bit too high for Ying and me to reach.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: I got it. Looks like we just need to place the treasure map on top.

dialog.stepLabel: Encore: "And just like that, the little warrior's wish's come true, p..."

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: And just like that, the little warrior's wish's come true, putting a perfect ending to this adventure story.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: The warrior finally gets to meet her mother, telling her all the stories and words she has always wanted to tell.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But the warrior's journey won't end here, as the path ahead is a long one.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Encore, {PlayerName}. Thank you both so much.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I-I finally got to see her, and we talked so much. I told her how much I've missed her, how I found the treasures she left behind, and how I met both of you...

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I never thought I'd see her again.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: So, I want you to have this.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: Yes! I know you still have more adventures ahead, so I'd like this wreath to keep you company.

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I want to go back and tell my dad this story now, and tell him what my mother said to me. So, this is where we say goodbye.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Be sure to share our story with everyone!

items.speaker: Ying
items.text: I will! Goodbye!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Time for another feedback session from the audience. What do you think of this story?

options.text: It's a story with a very happy ending.
The fights were still a bit too realistic for me.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Hehe, Encore loves this ending!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: But the parts where everyone was fighting as a team were super, super cool!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Encore loves this ending!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: The Wooly Warrior finally fulfilled her wish, and she got to tell her mother all her stories.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: About the companions she got to meet.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Who she went on adventures with, defeating all kinds of monsters that stood in their way!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Their search for the sword and shield as a team, and how they put together the Wreath of Hope.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: We've been to many places together, but there's so much more to go, and so many adventures and stories to write about.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: These stories are an extension of life, they are...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Yeah. Stories with happy endings! Mom said the same thing.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Yeah, Encore had never thought of such an ending when telling the Wooly Warrior story in the past.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: I really enjoyed how it ended.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: The story of the Wooly Warrior's search for the relics is finished, and my vacation is about to end. It's time to head back to Black Shores...

options.text: That was a really short vacation.
Don't forget to finish your homework.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Well, we are kinda busy over there most of the year.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Oh, enough with the homework already.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: No biggie. Even though this story is over, Encore will make sure to prepare a new adventure next time we meet!

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Let's be on the same team together, and you can still be the captain! Wanna do a pinky promise?

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: You reach out and lock your pinky with Encore's. Gazing into her eyes, you see the Wooly Warrior's earnest expression as she makes a heartfelt wish.

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: I pinky promise that we'll write as many stories as we can together...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: As a team...

items.speaker: Encore
items.text: Pinky promised!
